Exception eligibility matrix

Exception eligibility summary

Exception eligibility matrix

Exception eligibility matrices matter when operators need a compact map of which recovery exceptions remain eligible after a burst-credit window tightens.

The matrix ties exception tiers to grace thresholds, dashboard checks, and the fallback regions allowed to continue serving traffic.

It also makes clear where shared throughput stability overrides local exception relief.

Related limit guides
